title: Foolish Monte Carlo
writer: Carlton Dawe (novel), George Edwardes-Hall, William Humphrey
actors: Mary Clare, Lydia Kyasht, Bertram Burleigh, Sam Livesey
plot: A young girl in Monte Carlo is engaged to a nobleman, but is really in love with someone else. A jewel thief named "The Black Spider" has been robbing the wealthy of Monte Carlo, and as a ...
